en_title: The Blood of Dawnwalker Preorders Are Live, Here’s What Comes in Each Edition
cn_title: 《黎明行者之血》预购开启，各版本内容一览
subtitle: 预购实体版有惊喜
opus_summary: 《黎明行者之血》预购现已开启，9月3日登陆PS5、Xbox和PC。标准版70美元(约合人民币474元)(约508元)，收藏版200美元(约合人民币1354元)。

paragraphs.en: This year's summer gaming presentations had quite a lot to show off, particularly Summer Game Fest . If you caught the new trailer for The Blood of Dawnwalker during Geoff Keighley's big showcase, and were instantly interested in jumping into its world, we have good news: Preorders are officially live for it across PS5, Xbox Series X and PC.
paragraphs.cn: 今年的夏季游戏发布会内容相当丰富，尤其是夏日游戏节。如果你在Geoff Keighley的大型展示会上看了《黎明行者之血》的新预告片，并且立刻想要投身其世界，我们有好消息：该作的预购现已正式在PS5、Xbox Series X和PC平台开启。

paragraphs.en: Below, we've broken down what editions are available to preorder right now, how much they cost, and any preorder bonuses or extras that they may come with. Its release date is just a few months away - landing early in the busy September slot on the 3rd - so now is the time to secure a copy so you're ready to play on release day.
paragraphs.cn: 下面我们整理了当前可预购的各版本、它们的价格，以及可能附带的预购奖励或额外内容。本作距离发售只有几个月，将于9月初这个拥挤档期的3号推出，所以现在是时候锁定一份，好在发售日当天就玩上。

paragraphs.en: The standard release of The Blood of Dawnwalker is available for $69.99 across PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X, and PC. In regard to the PC version, you can actually scoop it up for a little bit cheaper from Fanatical right now, which is a fun surprise. By ordering this standard version early you'll get a preorder bonus as well, which we've detailed below, but those interested in a physical copy get a little extra.
paragraphs.cn: 《黎明行者之血》标准版在PS5、Xbox Series X和PC上售价69.99美元(约合人民币474元)。至于PC版，你实际上现在可以在Fanatical上以稍低的价格入手，这算是个小惊喜。提早预购标准版也会获得预购奖励，我们会在下文详细介绍；不过对那些想要实体版的人来说，还会有额外的好处。

paragraphs.en: For those who preorder a physical copy of the standard edition, you'll receive the Day 1 Edition of The Blood of Dawnwalker. It is priced the same as the standard version, but comes with a steelbook and world map alongside the base game disc, which you can see in the image below.
paragraphs.cn: 预购实体标准版的玩家将获得《黎明行者之血》首发版。其售价与标准版相同，但附带一块铁盒和世界地图，外加游戏光盘，你可以在下图中看到。

paragraphs.en: Other retailers are also offering their own bonuses with a physical preorder, like Best Buy and GameStop. If you preorder through the former, you'll get a free $10 Best Buy gift card with your purchase. GameStop, on the other hand, is offering its own exclusive bonus on physical preorders of a sticker set, which you can see in the image below.
paragraphs.cn: 其他零售商，如百思买和GameStop，也为实体预购提供了各自的奖励。如果你通过百思买预购，购买后会免费获得一张10美元(约合人民币68元)的百思买礼品卡。而GameStop则为实体预购提供独家贴纸套装奖励，你可以在下图中看到。

paragraphs.en: The Eclipse Edition of The Blood of Dawnwalker is only available digitally and priced at $79.99 (or a little less if you're buying for PC through Fanatical). Alongside the base game and preorder bonus, this version comes with:
paragraphs.cn: 《黎明行者之血》日食版仅提供数字版，售价79.99美元(约合人民币542元)（如果通过Fanatical购买PC版，价格稍低）。除游戏本体和预购奖励外，该版本还包含：

paragraphs.en: The Collector's Edition of The Blood of Dawnwalker is stacked with exciting goodies for those ready to drop some cash on it. Priced at $199.99, it comes with the following alongside the base game and preorder bonus:
paragraphs.cn: 《黎明行者之血》收藏版则为那些愿意为此掏钱的玩家准备了一大堆诱人的周边。售价199.99美元(约合人民币1354元)，除游戏本体和预购奖励外，还包含以下内容：

paragraphs.en: By ordering any edition of The Blood of Dawnwalker early, you'll get the Sangoran Wayfarer’s Armor Set as a preorder bonus, which you can see in the photo above.
paragraphs.cn: 提前预购任意版本的《黎明行者之血》，你都将获得Sangoran Wayfarer装甲套装作为预购奖励，如上图所示。

paragraphs.en: The Blood of Dawnwalker is the debut game from developer Rebel Wolves, which was founded by developers who formerly worked at CD Projekt Red. It's a single-player, open-world action RPG that sees you playing as Coen, "A young man turned into a Dawnwalker, forever treading the line between the world of day and the realm of night" according to The Blood of Dawnwalker website .
paragraphs.cn: 《黎明行者之血》是开发商Rebel Wolves的首款作品，该工作室由前CD Projekt Red的开发人员创立。这是一款单人开放世界动作RPG，玩家将扮演Coen，根据《黎明行者之血》官网描述，他是「一个变成黎明行者的年轻人，永远游走在白昼世界与黑夜领域之间」。

paragraphs.en: IGN's Matt Purslow was able to check it out recently - in particular, its prologue - and wrote in his hands-off preview that "It feels like Rebel Wolves has created a prologue that effectively establishes a dark medieval world and lays the initial tracks for Coen’s interesting dual-lane journey in which you must master both the man and the vampire. It’s knowing what comes after all this, though – the depth of its day/night “narrative sandbox” and the multitude of opportunities for both sides of Coen that I was shown previously – that places The Blood of Dawnwalker among the small handful of games that I’m impatiently waiting for this year."
paragraphs.cn: IGN的Matt Purslow最近有机会体验了本作——尤其是其序章——并在他的非上手预览中写道：「感觉Rebel Wolves制作的序章有效地构建了一个黑暗的中世纪世界，并为Coen那有趣的双线旅程铺下了最初轨道，在这次旅程中你必须同时掌控人类和吸血鬼两面。不过，正是了解到这一切之后的内容——即我之前看到过的日夜『叙事沙盒』的深度，以及Coen两面的众多机会——才让《黎明行者之血》跻身我今年等不及的少数几款游戏行列。」

paragraphs.en: Hannah Hoolihan is a freelancer who writes with the guides and commerce teams here at IGN.
paragraphs.cn: Hannah Hoolihan是一名自由撰稿人，为IGN的指南和商务团队撰稿。
